description_long: This axe features a striking, fantasy-inspired design with a double-edged blade that is broad, angular, and metallic silver at the cutting edges. The central section of the axe head is adorned with a large, purple, eye-like ornament, surrounded by dark, organic, tentacle-like forms that wrap around the handle. The handle itself is short, robust, and tapers toward a spiked pommel, with a dark purple and black color scheme. The overall aesthetic is menacing and mystical, with a blend of metallic and organic motifs. The axe appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with decorative elements that resemble carved or molded resin or polymer. Its compact size and elaborate design suggest it is more ornamental or ceremonial than utilitarian.
description: A compact, double-edged axe with a silver blade, purple eye motif, and tentacle-like decorations wrapping a dark handle. The design is ornate, mystical, and menacing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the double-edged blade, central purple eye, and tentacle-like decorations wrapping the handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the axe's thin profile and the depth of the tentacle decorations wrapping around the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the blade, the tentacle forms, and the spiked pommel at the handle's base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thinness of the blade and the curvature of the tentacle elements.
attribute_handle_type: Short, robust, and slightly tapered handle with a round cross-section, wrapped by tentacle-like decorative elements; appears to be made of polymer or resin with a matte finish.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, broad, and angular blade with metallic silver edges; central eye motif and organic, tentacle-like decorations; no beard or poll, highly ornamental.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite style, with blade and handle appearing as a single molded or fused piece, reinforced by decorative elements.
